title: Raw Block Smelting
description: Allows you to smelt raw ore blocks directly rather than un-crafting them to smelt individual ingots.
body:
Allows you to smelt raw ore blocks directly rather than un-crafting them to smelt individual ingots. Works with the  normal Furnace and Blast Furnace.

---
Supported Versions
- 1.17.X
- 1.18-1.18.1
- 1.18.2
- 1.19-1.19.3
- 1.19.4
- 1.20.X
